phrases.Are you sure to delete group: %{group}: Are you sure to delete group: %{group}

phrases.Are you sure to delete this booking?: Are you sure to delete this booking?
phrases.ARE YOU SURE TO DELETE USER: %{user}?: ARE YOU SURE TO DELETE USER: %{user}?
User has a booking in the past. Deleting the user will delete the past booking from the report.||||User has %{smart_count} bookings in the past. Deleting the user will delete past bookings from the report.
phrases.You will delete the log of user's past b: You will delete the log of user's past bookings. It is usually a better idea to BLOCK the user.
phrases.Are you sure to delete user: %{user}: Are you sure to delete user: %{user}
phrases.Select users to which the seat will be a: Select users to which the seat will be assigned:
phrases.The seat is available to be booked on th: The seat is available to be booked on the selected dates and time.
The seat is available to be booked on the selected dates and time. However, you have other bookings at that time which will be automatically updated.
phrases.The seat is booked by another person or: The seat is booked by another person or not available.
phrases.The seat is in a view-only zone — you ca: The seat is in a view-only zone — you can see it but cannot book it.
phrases.The seat is booked by someone in a view-: The seat is booked by someone in a view-only zone — you can see it but cannot book it.
phrases.The seat is booked by you on the selecte: The seat is booked by you on the selected date and time.
phrases.The seat is booked by you, but not exact: The seat is booked by you, but not exactly on the selected date or time. You can update booking, all your other reservations at that time will be automatically updated.
The seat is booked by you, but not exactly on the selected date or time. You CANNOT update the booking as it is conflicting with another user booking.
phrases.The same meaning as the green type icon,: The same meaning as the green type icon, but the seat is assigned to you, not assigned people cannot book it. Note that assignment isn't necessarily exclusive, the seat can be assigned to more than one person.
phrases.The seat is disabled, cannot be booked,: The seat is disabled, cannot be booked, and is not visible to non-admins.
phrases.The seat is assigned to some people. Thi: The seat is assigned to some people. This status is visible only to admins. Note that you won't see this icon if the seat is assigned to you.
phrases.Seat is successfully disabled.<br>Howeve:
Seat is successfully disabled.
However there are existing reservations in the the next few weeks. Existing reservations are not automatically removed, it has to be done manually.
phrases.Seat is successfully assigned.<br>Howeve:
Seat is successfully assigned.
However there are non-assignees' existing reservations in the the next few weeks. Existing reservations are not automatically removed, it has to be done manually.
phrases.You will delete the log of all past book: You will delete the log of all past bookings in this zone. It is usually a better idea to unassign all users from the zone to make it inaccessible.
phrases.Are you sure to delete zone: %{zone_name: Are you sure to delete zone: %{zone_name}
phrases.Are you sure to delete plan: %{plan_name: Are you sure to delete plan: %{plan_name}
phrases.Zone name and zone group cannot be empty: Zone name and zone group cannot be empty.
phrases.Are you sure to unassign %{user} from th: Are you sure to unassign %{user} from the zone?

phrases.Select a zone to reassign seats to, or u: Select a zone to reassign seats to, or use the button below to delete the seats without reassignment.
phrases.No other zones exist. You may only delet: No other zones exist. You may only delete the seats along with this zone.

phrases.This will remove the seats and all their: This will remove the seats and all their past booking history. This cannot be undone.
